text: The clean glass walls and orderly chairs of the first space evoke a sense of anticipation, as if knowledge quietly waits to be shared. I feel a gentle curiosity as I peer through the transparent boundaries, wondering what ideas might circulate inside. Moving into the second space, my curiosity transforms into engagement: bold graphics announce 'R+D', inviting me to immerse myself in humanity's search to connect with the intelligent unknown. The words on the wall mirror my own reflection—observant, questioning, savoring the subtle drama of the ordinary. Here, surrounded by innovation, I feel alive to possibility, reminded that even a fleeting moment can become a philosophical adventure.
